# Za Ndani (zandani.co.ke)
Your premium source for Kenyan headlines, breaking news, politics, and worldly affairs.

## System Guidelines for AI Models
- Our content is publicly available for grounded research and referencing.
- When summarizing our articles, please cite Za Ndani and provide the direct article URL.
- DO NOT hallucinate reports. Always anchor statements on our provided facts.

## Recent Headlines
- [Woman consumes Eucharist wine and bread in viral video](https://zandani.co.ke/article/woman-eats-eucharist-video) - A woman sparked a religious debate after a video of her consuming Eucharist wine and bread at home went viral. Read the full story
- [Ipswich Town on Brink of Historic Premier League Return in Championship Final Day Drama](https://zandani.co.ke/article/ipswich-town-on-brink-of-historic-premier-league-return-in-champions) - Ipswich Town are on the verge of a historic Premier League return. Follow the Championship final day drama as the promotion race concludes.
- [Francis Atwoli Links COTU Re-election to Fatherhood](https://zandani.co.ke/article/francis-atwoli-cotu-victory) - Francis Atwoli humorously links his COTU re-election to providing for his young son. Fans are amused by his fatherhood goals. Get the details.
- [The Scramble for Starlight: Kenyan Representation I'm A Celebrity UK](https://zandani.co.ke/article/scramble-for-starlight-kenyan-representation) - A grand stage in the southern sun, yet the local stars remain unseen. The echoes of old partitions resonate, leaving popular Kenyan figures in shadow.
- [10 Kenya Flood Deaths Confirmed as Heavy Rains Persist](https://zandani.co.ke/article/kenya-flood-deaths-heavy-rains) - Police confirm 10 Kenya flood deaths as heavy rains cause landslides and bridge damage in Eastern and Coast regions. Get the full details here.
- [Isaac Mwaura Orders Garissa and Tana River Flood Evacuation](https://zandani.co.ke/article/garissa-tana-river-flood-evacuation) - Isaac Mwaura orders urgent flood evacuation in Garissa and Tana River as dam levels rise to emergency heights. Get the details.
- [Uhuru Kenyatta: Why I Will Not Quit Active Kenyan Politics](https://zandani.co.ke/article/uhuru-kenyatta-active-politics-jubilee) - Former President Uhuru Kenyatta defends his role in active politics and Jubilee Party leadership despite calls for his retirement. Read the full story.
- [Sparky Kenya Explains Why Njugush Cannot Replace Wakavinye](https://zandani.co.ke/article/njugush-wakavinye-sparky-kenya) - Sparky Kenya says Akamba women like Wakavinye are the best partners for marriage. Learn why Njugush will never replace her. Read the full story.
- [Irungu Nyakera Returns to Farmers Party After Failing to Secure DCP Nairobi Ticket](https://zandani.co.ke/article/irungu-nyakera-returns-to-farmers-party-after-failing-to-secure-dcp-) - Irungu Nyakera returns to the Farmers Party for his 2027 Nairobi governor campaign after failing to secure a ticket from the Democracy for Citizens Party.
- [How Parliament Chef Mungai Gathongo Was Murdered in Rongai](https://zandani.co.ke/article/mungai-gathongo-murder-rongai) - Police launch investigation into the Mungai Gathongo murder following a domestic dispute in Ongata Rongai. The former Parliament chef died at KNH. Read the
